notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Nasim Nuñez steals (21) 2nd base. Nasim Nuñez to 3rd. Nasim Nuñez advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Hayden Senger.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Carson Benge. Keibert Ruiz out at home on the throw, right fielder Carson Benge to catcher Hayden Senger.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. lines out to center fielder A.J. Ewing.

notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien grounds into a double play, first baseman Luis García Jr. to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr. Brett Baty out at 2nd. Marcus Semien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luis Torrens pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Torrens grounds out, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr.
